<user_query>
You are reviewing whether a proposed /deploy-fuyao execution plan is compliant with the deploy-fuyao command contract and skill. Check: branch/task/label prompting and precedence, queue default handling, task resolution against task_registry.register("..."), explicit confirmation before SSH even when --yes, branch sync local->origin->remote kernel, SSH command target and payload, and post-submit reporting. Identify residual blockers by severity and suggest exact remaining work before execution.
</user_query>
